/usr/bin/c++ -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/usr/local/opt/llvm@19/lib -L/usr/local/opt/llvm@19/lib -L/usr/local/opt/llvm@19/lib -L/usr/local/opt/llvm@19/lib -o libAlgebricIdOptsPass.dylib -install_name @rpath/libAlgebricIdOptsPass.dylib CMakeFiles/AlgebricIdOptsPass.dir/AlgebricIdOpts.cpp.o  -undefined dynamic_lookup
